body_txt: For whatever reason, a character cannot dream. Perhaps they are dead already, or has spent too long in cryo-sleep, but their ability to dream is gone. This tends to indicate that something is inhuman or "off" about them. May also be caused by a Dream Stealer . In Real Life , there are people who claim to have no recollection of ever dreaming; whether it is this trope or simply that they never remember their dreams is unknown.
